allow: Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('housedda.db'\); print\('seen_listings rows:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM seen_listings'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\); conn.close\(\)")
Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('housedda.db'\); rows = conn.execute\('SELECT * FROM seen_listings'\).fetchall\(\); [print\(r\) for r in rows]; conn.close\(\)")
